category_sources: source_facts.description says Soft Serve is a self-hostable Git server for the command line; official README at https://github.com/charmbracelet/soft-serve documents Git server functionality.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is soft-serve; official repository README title and branding use Soft Serve.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation for Soft Serve setup, commands, TUI, access control, and hooks.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/charmbracelet/soft-serve, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a self-hostable Git server; official README documents SSH, HTTP/Git protocol cloning, TUI browsing, repos, and access control.
